tasks.check: deno check router.ts router_test.ts doctor.ts model-catalog.ts setup.ts examples/**/*.ts integrations/**/*.ts src/**/*.ts packages/**/*.ts site/**/*.ts
tasks.fmt: deno fmt router.ts router_test.ts doctor.ts model-catalog.ts setup.ts examples integrations src packages site README.md docs deno.json .github/workflows
tasks.lint: deno lint router.ts router_test.ts doctor.ts model-catalog.ts setup.ts examples integrations src packages site
tasks.test: deno test -A router_test.ts examples/**/*_test.ts integrations/**/*_test.ts src/**/*_test.ts packages/**/*_test.ts site/**/*_test.ts
tasks.lock: deno cache --lock=deno.lock router.ts router_test.ts doctor.ts model-catalog.ts setup.ts examples/**/*.ts integrations/**/*.ts src/**/*.ts packages/**/*.ts site/**/*.ts
tasks.lock:check: deno cache --lock=deno.lock --frozen router.ts router_test.ts doctor.ts model-catalog.ts setup.ts examples/**/*.ts integrations/**/*.ts src/**/*.ts packages/**/*.ts site/**/*.ts && deno task --config examples/local-model-dogfood/deno.json lock:check
